description: Susan Sternglass Noble has had a long career as a leading analyst and investor in financial services companies. Susan has worked in senior roles at Goldman Sachs, JP Morgan, CQS and AXA Investment Managers. She has been active in corporate governance of financial institutions. Susan has recently been appointed as Senior Adviser to the Investor Forum. Susan holds dual British and US citizenship and is a Fellow of the Royal Society of Arts, Commerce and Manufacture.

details.body:
Susan Sternglass Noble has had a long career as a leading analyst and investor in financial services companies. Susan has worked in senior roles at Goldman Sachs, JP Morgan, CQS and AXA Investment Managers. She has been active in corporate governance of financial institutions. Susan has recently been appointed as Senior Adviser to the Investor Forum.

Susan holds dual British and US citizenship and is a Fellow of the Royal Society of Arts, Commerce and Manufacture.

Commissioners support the Chair in meeting the terms of reference for the Independent Dormant Assets Commission.
